code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance + amount))
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let a0 = Account(balance: 100)

  mut current = a0
  mut last_status = "ok"

  match deposit(current, 50)
  when Ok(a)
    current = a
    last_status = "ok"
  when Err(_)
    last_status = "overdraft"
  end

  match withdraw(current, 30)
  when Ok(a)
    current = a
    last_status = "ok"
  when Err(_)
    last_status = "overdraft"
  end

  match withdraw(current, 500)
  when Ok(a)
    current = a
    last_status = "ok"
  when Err(_)
    last_status = "overdraft"
  end

  println("final_balance=#{current.balance}")
  println("last_status=#{last_status}")
end
